title: powpow config
description: Configuration for the powpow build tool.

version.description: Config version number for future use.

portalConfigPath.description: Relative path from config file to the Power Pages portal config root directory.

sourceDir.description: Relative path from config file to the TypeScript source directory.

entryPoints.description: Entry points mapping source files to Power Pages portal resource GUIDs.

source.description: Source file path relative to sourceDir, or a bare package specifier (e.g. "lodash") to bundle an installed package into a web-file.

target.description: Power Pages resource GUID (web-template or web-file).

globals.description: Map of package specifiers to globalThis variable names. Imports of these packages will be replaced with references to the corresponding global variable (UMD globals).
